turns.assistant:
Namaste!

As a Jyotishi AI, my purpose is to provide insights and guidance based on the principles of Vedic astrology. I do not have access to any personal information about you, including your name. My knowledge is limited to the astrological principles and texts I've been trained on, and I cannot identify individuals or their personal details.

To receive an astrological reading or analysis, you would typically provide your birth details (date, time, and place of birth).

Please let me know if you have any questions related to Vedic astrology, and I'll be happy to assist you!
